description_text: For 2015-19 BMW F80 M3 F82 F83 M4 V Style Carbon Fiber LED Rear Bumper Diffuser Fits ALL Following Models: Fits 2015-2018 BMW F80 M3 All Models Fits 2015-2019 BMW F82 F83 M4 All Models Wiring Work Is Required For LED Light Package Includes : 1 * Carbon Fiber Rear Bumper LED Diffuser Replacement W/ Corner Extension As Shown In the Picture Features: 100% Brand New & Never Been Used. Real Carbon Fiber V Style Rear Bumper LED Diffuser With Corner Extensions For BMW M3/M4. This Diffuser Kit Features An Re-designed Big Aggressive Aerodynamic Vortex Shark Fins With New F1 Style LED Strobe Brake Lights. Excellent Fitment And Quality. The Middle Diffuser is Direct Clip-on Installation With the Well-Constructed Tab. The Two Corner Extensions Are Added To The Sides By Self-Tapping Screws. Please Note That There Is Wiring Work Such As Spicing and Connecting Required For LED Lights. Made Of Super Lightweight And Durable Real Carbon Fiber Material. Quality 3K Weave Pattern Carbon Fiber Cover With Hard UV-Protected Coating. This Kit Not Only Improves Appearance and Aerodynamic, But Also Improves Safety By Adding More Visibility To The Rear End. *Instruction Not Included. Removing the Rear Bumper For Installation is Recommended to Properly Fit the Diffuser. Drilling is Required For Installation. Wiring Work Such As Connecting and Spicing is Also Required For The Brake Light. Professional Installation Is Highly Recommended Contact Us Return Policy Shipping Business Hours: Days: Monday-Friday Except Public Holidays Time: 10:00 AM to 5:00 PM PST We strive for 5star service in our product quality, communication, shipping speed & rates. We know you have many choices on eBay, and are most appreciative that you have chosen to shop with us. If you are not satisfied or if you have any questions/issue you want to address, please feel free to contact us via email and our customer service representative will get back to you as soon as possible to work out the best solution. We are doing our best to reply every email ASAP during our business hours. Please understand that emails sent to us on Sat, Sun and public Holidays will be reply on next business days. Thank you!
